description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages clang-format-check, test, user-integration, and conan-integration. Add a clang-format-check job using the image manu343726/tinyrefl:clang-format-ci, tags linux and docker, that runs `CLANG_FORMAT=clang-format ./ci/ci_clang_format_check.sh` and `echo clang-format was applied ok`. Add conan-integration jobs for each compiler (clang60, gcc5‑8) using the matching manu343726/tinyrefl:<compiler>-x86 images, retry 2, tags linux/docker, and a script that runs `conan create tool Manu343726/testing --build=missing --build=tinyrefl-tool`, `conan create . Manu343726/testing --build=missing --build=tinyrefl`, and conditionally uploads `tinyrefl-tool` and `tinyrefl` with `conan upload` when CI_COMMIT_TAG is set. Add test jobs for every compiler/arch/LLVM version combination that use the corresponding image, tags linux/docker, and execute `export LLVM_VERSION=$(echo $CI_JOB_NAME | sed -E "s/${CI_JOB_STAGE}-(.+)-llvm(.+)/\2/g")`, `./ci/ci_test.sh`, and `echo finished ok`. Add user-integration jobs for the same matrix that run the same export command, then `./ci/ci_user_integration.sh` and `echo finished ok`. Apply a global before_script that adds the conan remote and logs in with $manu343726_bintray_key, and set GIT_STRATEGY to clone.
